description: S1 Liquidity Vacuum V2 - Multi-bar capitulation detection with recommended starting thresholds

archetypes._comment_S1: Liquidity Vacuum V2 - Multi-bar capitulation detection enabled

liquidity_vacuum._note_regime_filter_flag: Set to true to enable regime gating (blocks bull market trades)
liquidity_vacuum._comment_v2_hard_gates: V2 Hard Gates - Must pass BOTH for detection
liquidity_vacuum._note_cap_depth: Drawdown from 30d high. -0.20 = 20% drawdown required. More negative = tighter (fewer trades)
liquidity_vacuum._note_crisis: Crisis environment score [0,1]. 0.35 = catches FTX (0.303 baseline). Lower = more trades. ADJUSTED from 0.40
liquidity_vacuum._comment_v2_exhaustion: V2 Exhaustion Signals - Must pass AT LEAST ONE (OR gate)
liquidity_vacuum._note_vol_climax: Max volume panic in last 3 bars. 0.50 = strong spike. Higher = tighter. ADJUSTED from 0.25
liquidity_vacuum._note_wick_exhaust: Max wick rejection in last 3 bars. 0.60 = extreme rejection. Higher = tighter. ADJUSTED from 0.30
liquidity_vacuum._comment_v2_weights: V2 Feature Weights - Used for final fusion scoring after gates pass
liquidity_vacuum._note_v1: Used when V2 features missing. Automatically activates if capitulation_depth not in dataframe
liquidity_vacuum._note_fusion_th: Minimum fusion score (V1 and V2). Lower = looser (more trades)
liquidity_vacuum._note_liq_max: V1 hard gate. Max liquidity score (lower = more drained). Higher = looser
liquidity_vacuum._note_vol_z: V1 volume panic threshold (z-score). Lower = looser (more trades)
liquidity_vacuum._note_wick_min: V1 wick rejection threshold. Lower = looser (more trades)
liquidity_vacuum._comment_v1_weights: V1 Feature Weights - Used for V1 fallback scoring
liquidity_vacuum._note_regimes: Only trade in these GMM regime labels. Blocks bull market noise
liquidity_vacuum._note_drawdown_override: If drawdown > 10%, bypass regime check (catches flash crashes)
liquidity_vacuum._note_regime_logic: If true, pass if regime OK OR drawdown severe. If false, require BOTH
liquidity_vacuum._note_risk: 2% account risk per trade (capitulation reversals are volatile)
liquidity_vacuum._note_stop: 2.5x ATR stop (wider than usual - accommodates violent bounces)
liquidity_vacuum._note_cooldown: 12 hour cooldown between signals (prevents overtrading same event)

liquidity_vacuum._comment: Trail with 2.0 ATR, 72h max hold (capitulation bounces are fast)

_optimization_notes._comment: Suggested Optuna parameter ranges for optimization

_tuning_guide._quick_fix_applied: 2025-11-23: Thresholds adjusted based on research findings (237→30-50 trades/year target)

to_catch_ftx_event._note: FTX baseline: crisis=0.303, vol=0.328, wick=0.210. Current thresholds should catch it.
to_catch_ftx_event.trade_off: If still missing, lower to 0.30 but expect ~20% more false positives

_validation_results._comment: Tested on 2022 major capitulations with these thresholds
